linkedin_profile.headline: London Region Sales Manager - Entertainment and Corporate
linkedin_profile.about: Managing the Entertainment market for Lore Group London Region representing the vibrant One Hundred Shoreditch and iconic Sea Containers. I have a Bachelor's degree in Business, Management, Marketing, and Advertising from Università LUMSA, and I am passionate about hospitality and customer relationship management. I have over six years of sales and marketing experience in the hospitality industry, working with various types of clients and agencies. I have managed corporate, transient, consortia, and long stay accounts for Native, a leading provider of apart hotels and apartments in London. I have also worked as a Sales Manager at Mama Shelter London and Ace Hotel London, where I increased bookings, revenue, and customer satisfaction. I have contributed to the success of these organizations by using my new business development, CRM, and negotiation skills. I am eager to bring my diverse perspectives and experiences to the team and align my goals with the organization's culture and vision.

experience.title: Coffee Wine Head Barista
experience.description: • Confirmed guest orders including any special requests from the lounge server using the bar’s point-of-sales system. • Prepared and served a selection of beverages from the menu while ensuring proper pouring, mixing, and blending according to established recipes and established standards whilst offering vivid descriptions of the each item’s, origin, taste and preparation methods to guests. • Managed a team of 8 Baristas from 2008 till 2010 at Vinum Winebar.

experience.title: Assistant Merchandiser VM
experience.description: - Supported and managed the intake of stock into the retail business. - Provided administrative support to the merchandising/planning and buying team by analysing reports (Forecasts + stock levels). - Supported the merchandiser to produce a monthly terminal stock report for the current season. - Ensured on-time delivery of orders to the warehouse by liaising with suppliers on a weekly basis & effectively communicating any changes to the Buying & Merchandising teams. - Answered customer emails/phone calls and built a database of loyal customers.

experience.title: Tourist Information Officer
experience.description: - Provided consistently high levels of customer service in a way that promotes Malta, added to the enjoyment of visitors and value to the information service. - Delivered pro-active levels of ticket and retail sales to enhance the financial performance of the Tourist Information Center. - Responded to inquiries in person at the Tourist Information Center, by phone or by email providing accurate and relevant information which actively encourages people to visit. - Compiled reports on seasonal events outcomes. - Staff training and supervision when required.

experience.title: Europe Marketing Executive
experience.description: - Managed dynamic marketing strategies aligned with company objectives alongside the CMO. - Led and managed campaign briefs and initiated campaign kickoffs in collaboration with agency partners. - Curated the annual social media calendar for various social media platforms. - Compiled detailed monthly reports encompassing budgetary and digital marketing activities. - Planned, executed, and managed bespoke press trip programs targeting VIP guests, with a strong emphasis on Influencer Marketing. - Attended international trade shows to nurture supplier relationships and negotiate marketing agreements.

experience.title: International Marketing Coordinator
experience.description: - Managed the marketing mix for 350 hotels, with a primary focus on social media platforms, reporting directly to the Director of Marketing. - Strategized and curated engaging social media content calendar, driving brand visibility and engagement. - Developed, executed, and spearheaded successful multi-channel campaigns, collaborating with both internal teams and external partners. - Played a key role in planning and implementing the annual marketing plan alongside the international marketing team, ensuring activities were data-driven, measurable, and within budgetary constraints. - Monitored and analyzed comprehensive marketing reports for all digital marketing initiatives, leveraging platforms such as Google Analytics, social media metrics, and Power BI. - Optimized and updated CRM tools to facilitate targeted marketing activities. - Acted as a brand ambassador, participating in press trips to foster brand awareness and strengthen relationships.

experience.title: Marketing Executive
experience.description: - Developed and executed comprehensive marketing strategies and tactics to drive customer acquisition and retention across content, CRM, digital, app and social channels, reporting directly to the Head of Marketing. - Contributed to the creation and execution of the promotional marketing activity calendar, from concept generation to production and implementation, with a primary focus on Social Media and newsletters. - Created engaging content to drive social media interaction and enhance brand awareness campaigns. - Managed digital paid advertising platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, and Google Ads. - Provided support for centrally-organized events and promotions. - Led and managed app content and promotional calendar, from content curation to scheduling. - Delivered weekly reports on communications and social media performance.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
experience.description: BRAND MARKETING - Collaborated closely with the CEO and the Strategy Director to establish brand objectives, chart strategic direction, and effectively execute comprehensive marketing campaigns across the entire marketing mix. - Developed and implemented marketing campaigns across paid and organic social media, newsletters, and digital paid advertising. - Crafted and nurtured the social media presence and fostered the growth of the vibrant SUITCASE community. - Analyzed and reported the performance of all digital marketing campaigns, evaluating their effectiveness against predetermined goals such as ROI and KPIs. - Leveraged strong analytical skills to assess the end-to-end customer experience across various channels and touchpoints. PARTNERSHIP MARKETING - Collaborated with partners to devise mutually beneficial marketing plans aligned with shared objectives. - Accountable for attaining partner marketing and sales objectives. - Led, executed, and evaluated campaign performance while implementing continuous improvements. - Effectively managed cross-functional teams and internal resources to prioritize campaign delivery. KEY HIGHLIGHTS - Achieved an impressive social media net audience growth of 2,993.8% within 90 days, resulting in a significant expansion of the brand's online reach and engagement. - Successfully enhanced the newsletter database, driving a remarkable growth rate of 36% during the same 90-day period. - Leveraged social paid advertising strategies to effectively reach an impressive 33 million accounts, bolstering brand visibility and awareness.

experience.title: Brand Marketing Manager At One Hundred Shoreditch
experience.description: Marketing Strategy & Brand Management - Collaborate with the Marketing Director to design and implement creative, multi-channel marketing strategies for the hotel and F&B outlets. - Focus on driving brand awareness, commercial growth, and customer engagement through innovative campaigns, brand partnerships, and creative programming. - Track and report on ROI, ensuring alignment with business objectives and cultural positioning. Brand & PR Management - Ensure brand consistency across all channels, leading omnichannel collaborations and events. - Manage PR agency relationships and spearhead key initiatives like the 100 Club loyalty scheme, while building connections with key opinion leaders (KOLs) and brand ambassadors to enhance reach. Digital & Brand Collateral - Drive digital strategy optimisation across all platforms, including email marketing, SEO, and social media. - Oversee accurate, on-brand digital and printed marketing materials for the hotel and F&B outlets. Partnerships & Programming - Develop and execute innovative monthly programming and brand partnerships, managing timelines, budgets, and deliverables. - Ensure successful event execution, working collaboratively with internal teams. Commercials & Reporting - Manage and track marketing budgets, analyse campaign performance, and measure ROI. - Provide regular performance reports, aligning marketing initiatives with business growth. - Lead and develop the marketing team to ensure the execution of strategic goals.
